svg.title: Marginalia geometry parameters in a Quarto Typst page
svg.desc: A schematic of the top portion of a Typst page rendered through Quarto. Faint dashed lines drop from a measurement bracket at the top of the figure, marking the horizontal Marginalia geometry sections from left to right: inner.far, inner.width, inner.separation, body, outer.separation, outer.width, outer.far. The page continues beyond the bottom edge of the figure.

g.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'DejaVu Sans Mono', monospace
